Operation 'requestSenderConfirmation' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description is completely empty. Added context about the confirmation workflow, what happens after the request, the required user action, return value, and the business purpose (sender verification requirement) to help AI agents understand when and why to use this operation.

data.description_suggestion: Initiates an email confirmation request for the specified sender. Sends a confirmation email to the sender's email address. The sender must click the confirmation link in the email to complete verification. Returns confirmation status. This operation is required before the sender can be used to send campaigns.
data.reasoning: Description is completely empty. Added context about the confirmation workflow, what happens after the request, the required user action, return value, and the business purpose (sender verification requirement) to help AI agents understand when and why to use this operation.

message: Operation 'confirmSender' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is vague about what 'signature' means in context. Description is empty. Added clarification that signature comes from confirmation email, explained the workflow connection to requestSenderConfirmation, specified the state change (verified status), and described the return value for better AI agent understanding of the confirmation flow.

data.summary_suggestion: Confirm sender email with verification signature
data.description_suggestion: Completes the sender confirmation process by validating the provided verification signature. The signature is typically obtained from the confirmation email link sent via requestSenderConfirmation. Upon successful confirmation, the sender's status is updated to verified and becomes eligible for sending campaigns. Returns the updated sender object with confirmed status.
data.reasoning: Summary is vague about what 'signature' means in context. Description is empty. Added clarification that signature comes from confirmation email, explained the workflow connection to requestSenderConfirmation, specified the state change (verified status), and described the return value for better AI agent understanding of the confirmation flow.
